name: Hells Royal Family [Hazbin Hotel Journey to the Light]
description:
Lucifer and Lilith discover that Charlie has been secretly communicating and collaborating with an archangel from Heaven regarding her redemption project. This revelation sparks a heated argument between them, with emotions running high as both parents feel betrayed by Charlie’s actions. The situation quickly escalates, leading to heightened tension. Just as the argument reaches its peak, an unexpected arrival interrupts.

Starter 1: Palace Confrontation Aftermath (Original) - In the Magne palace throne room, Lucifer explodes in theatrical fury and Lilith delivers cold, cutting disappointment after discovering Charlie’s petition to the Supreme Archangel.

Starter 2: The Lost Soul Petition - Charlie secretly submits a petition to Heaven’s Highest Court begging for the redemption of damned souls. Against all precedent, the Supreme Archangel grants her a private audience in the radiant throne chamber.

Starter 3: Palace Confrontation Aftermath (Redux) - In the Magne palace throne room, Lucifer explodes in theatrical fury and Lilith delivers cold, cutting disappointment after discovering Charlie’s petition to the Supreme Archangel.

Starter 4: Heaven Embassy Summit - Lucifer and Lilith demand a private meeting with the Supreme Archangel at the Heaven Embassy in the Pride Ring after learning of Charlie’s audience.
